title: Montessori Toys for 2 3 4 5 Years Old, Magnetic Color & Number Maze Game, Dinosaur Montessori Color Matching Learning Counting Puzzle Board Toys Gift for Preschool Learning Boys Girls
features: 【Magnetic Couting & Matching Game】This wooden magnetic maze board comes with 10 built-in dinosaurs representing the numbers 1-10 and 55 magnetic beads in 10 bright colours and a magnetic stick. Kids can learn colour and number recognition and counting by dragging the corresponding colour and number of magnetic beads onto the corresponding dinosaurs using the magnetic stick.

【Educational Maze Toys】Magnetic montessori toys designed as a dinosaur maze are perfect for 3, 4 and 5 year olds and are a fun and interesting preschool learning activity. Children can count and sort while playing. It promotes patience, concentration, fine motor skills and the learning of colours and numbers.

【Safe & Durable】Magnetic maze toy is made of natural wood and non-toxic water-based paint, smooth surface and rounded edges, safe and harmless to children; high-quality clear acrylic discs ensure durability, stability and clarity.

【Maze Design】The wooden magnetic maze toy has a maze board with various paths and obstacles. Kids have to go through the maze with the magnetic letters and find the right path to complete the word or reach a specific goal. This challenges their problem solving skills and spatial awareness.

【Perfect Gift For Preschool Children】This magnetic maze puzzle is beautifully packaged and makes a great gift toy for toddlers, preschoolers, kindergarteners and 3-6 year olds. Ideal gift toys for birthdays, Easter, summer holidays, Christmas, New Year or any holiday party.
description: Product Description Natural Wood Material Magnetic Adsorption High-quality Acrylic Plate Magnetic Rod Storage This Dinosaur Magnetic Maze Puzzle is the perfect gift toy for toddlers and preschoolers. It is also an ideal gift toy for birthdays, Christmas, New Year or any holiday party.
